description:
Perform a cortical bone assessment for the implant planned at tooth #30 (lower right first molar). Measure the buccal cortical bone thickness at three depths along the implant axis: 1mm below the bone crest (Crestal), 5mm below the bone crest (Mid-body), and 9mm below the bone crest (Apical). Record these measurements in a text file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\cortical_assessment.txt using the following format:

Cortical Bone Thickness Assessment - Tooth #30
Crestal (1mm): X.X mm
Mid-body (5mm): X.X mm
Apical (9mm): X.X mm
